es.title: Video: Aparato urinario
es.description: Si alguna vez te has preguntado de dónde proviene el pis, ¡este video tiene la respuesta!

en.title: How Does the Urinary System Work? (Video)
en.description: What's the Urinary System? And What's Pee? You drink, you pee. But urine is more than just that drink you had a few hours ago. If you've ever wondered where pee comes from, this movie has the answers!
